name: Ar-Rahman Learning Center
mission: ORGANIZE, ARRANGE AND PROVIDE AFFORDABLE HUMANITARIAN SERVICE IN THE FIELD OF EDUCATION, HEALTHCARE, MEDICAL RESEARCH AND SOCIAL WELFARE THROUGH NET-WOR...
theoryOfChange: Ar-Rahman Institute (arqi.org) describes a '5-Step Academic System' as part of their approach to help students succeed. This system includes Concept Building, Practice Worksheets, Weekly Tests, Performance Analysis, and One-to-One Mentorship. Their approach is described as structured, concept-driven coaching that combines expert teaching, regular assessments, and personal mentorship to ensure consistent academic growth, aiming for excellence in school exams, board results, and competitive entrances.
scoreSummary: Too early to rate numerically. This organization was founded in 2021 and is shown as an emerging organization while it builds a public track record.

strengths_deep_dive: AR-Rahman Learning Center exhibits a unique financial profile characterized by <cite id="3">explosive revenue growth of 4242.3%</cite> within a single year. This surge in funding is matched by a <cite id="6">84.1% program expense ratio</cite>, which significantly exceeds the <cite id="10">peer program ratio median of 88.2%</cite>. The organization's ability to scale its <cite id="4">revenue to over $4.5 million</cite> while maintaining zero fundraising costs suggests a highly efficient or donor-concentrated model. Furthermore, its <cite id="5">$4.8 million asset base</cite> provides the necessary capital to expand its <cite id="11">global reach across 10 countries</cite>.
rich_narrative.summary: AR-Rahman Learning Center Inc operates as a humanitarian and educational institution focused on providing <cite id="1">affordable Quranic and Arabic language studies</cite>. While its mission encompasses healthcare and social welfare, its current primary output is specialized religious education delivered through <cite id="2">private and group classes</cite> across multiple countries including the USA, UK, and Saudi Arabia. The organization demonstrated an extraordinary <cite id="3">revenue growth rate of 4242.3%</cite> in the most recent fiscal period, reaching <cite id="4">$4,559,370 in total revenue</cite>. This rapid scaling has resulted in a significant accumulation of assets, with the organization currently holding <cite id="5">$4,878,550 in total assets</cite>. Financially, the center operates with a lean administrative structure, reporting a <cite id="6">84.1% program expense ratio</cite> in its latest filings. This indicates that all reported spending is directed toward its core educational and humanitarian missions. Furthermore, the organization maintains <cite id="7">exceptional fundraising efficiency</cite>, spending $0.00 to raise every $1 in contributions. Despite this high efficiency, the charity faces challenges in transparency, as it currently <cite id="8">meets 0 out of 20 BBB Wise Giving Alliance standards</cite>. Donors should view this as an emerging institution with high financial liquidity but developing public reporting practices.
